title: Automatic liquid clustering is now available for Spark Declarative Pipelines on Lakeflow
body:
You can now use automatic liquid clustering with Spark Declarative Pipelines on Lakeflow. Use automatic liquid clustering with `CLUSTER BY AUTO`, and Databricks intelligently chooses clustering keys to optimize query performance.

See [Automatic liquid clustering](/aws/en/tables/clustering#auto-liquid), [create\_streaming\_table](/aws/en/ldp/developer/ldp-python-ref-streaming-table), [table](/aws/en/ldp/developer/ldp-python-ref-table), [CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW (pipelines)](/aws/en/ldp/developer/ldp-sql-ref-create-materialized-view), and [CREATE STREAMING TABLE (pipelines)](/aws/en/ldp/developer/ldp-sql-ref-create-streaming-table).
